inputs.label: Roof Area
inputs.businessContext: Total catchment area of the roof surface available for rainwater collection.

inputs.label: Runoff Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of rainfall that becomes runoff, accounting for roof material, slope, and evaporation losses.

inputs.label: Average Annual Rainfall
inputs.businessContext: Long-term average precipitation depth per year at the location.

inputs.label: Filter Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of harvested water that passes through the filtration system without loss.
